title: Show HN: Simple plugin to get Claude Code to listen to you
full_text:
Make Claude Code listen to you.

Peek steers Claude Code better than markdown files by learning your preferences automatically and injecting them at the right time.

Get started in five lines

>/plugin marketplace add Project-White-Rabbit/peek-claude-pluginClaude CodeClick to copy

>/plugin install peekClaude CodeClick to copy

>/exitClaude CodeClick to copy

$claude --resumeTerminalClick to copy

>/peek:loginClaude CodeClick to copy
